pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point to the river cruise and boat tours website with quick access to main categories, featured cruises, search by keyword/date/departure point, and highlighted promotions.
primary_functions: Introduce main cruise and tour offerings with featured and popular options
Provide primary navigation to key categories such as sightseeing, dinner, sunset, family, private charters, and gift cards
Allow users to start a quick search by keyword, date, or departure point (e.g., for Old Town Pier searches)
Highlight special offers and promotional codes (e.g., SUMMER10) for users to discover

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "All Cruises" CTA or header navigation item
Click on "Sightseeing Cruises" featured category tile
Click on "Dinner Cruises" featured category tile
Click on "Sunset & Evening" featured category tile
Click on "Family Cruises" featured category tile
Click on "Private Charters" featured category tile
Click on a featured or popular cruise card
Submit the homepage quick search form (e.g., search for "Old Town Pier")
Click on "Gift Cards" promo banner or navigation link
Click on cart icon in the header
Click on "Checkout" button from a mini-cart widget on the homepage

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Home" link in the primary header navigation
Direct entry via root URL or external marketing links

pages.name: Cruise & Tour Listings
pages.description: Reusable listing page showing cruises, tours, and private charters for a selected category with full filter and sort controls for dates, times, prices, features, duration, and group size.
primary_functions: Display lists of cruises and tours based on category (e.g., all_cruises, sightseeing, dinner_cruises, sunset_evening, family_friendly, private_charters)
Filter results by date or date range (including selecting specific Fridays, Saturdays, Sundays, and months such as June or September)
Filter by time of day (morning, afternoon, evening, departures before a specific time such as 2:00 PM)
Filter by price per adult and, where relevant, estimated total budget (e.g., max per adult or total budget sliders)
Filter by features and inclusions (e.g., sunset/evening theme, lunch included, live music, audio guide, drinks included, family-friendly, free cancellation)
Filter by duration and group size (e.g., minimum 2.5 hours, 3+ hours, capacity for 10 guests for private charters)
Filter by day-of-week and month for private charters (e.g., weekends in September only)
Sort results by price (low to high), rating (high to low), duration (longest first), and departure time (earliest first)
Open individual cruise, tour, or charter detail pages by clicking a result card or title

incoming_params.description: Navigation category to display, matching nav_category_id (e.g., all_cruises, sightseeing, dinner_cruises, sunset_evening, family_friendly, private_charters)
Optional specific date preselected in the date picker (YYYY-MM-DD) when deep linking from the homepage
Optional start of a date range filter (YYYY-MM-DD)
Optional end of a date range filter (YYYY-MM-DD)
Optional comma-separated list of time-of-day tags to prefilter results (e.g., 'morning,afternoon,evening,sunset')
Optional minimum price per adult to apply to the listing
Optional maximum price per adult to apply to the listing
Optional minimum duration to prefilter results (e.g., 150 for 2.5 hours)
Optional maximum duration to prefilter results
Optional comma-separated list of feature tags (e.g., 'lunch_included,live_music,audio_guide,drinks_included,free_cancellation') used to initialize feature filters
Optional comma-separated list of day-of-week values (e.g., 'friday,saturday,sunday') to prefilter results, especially for private charters
Optional minimum group size filter for private charters
Optional maximum group size filter for private charters
Optional initial sort order (e.g., 'price_asc', 'rating_desc', 'duration_desc', 'departure_time_asc')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a cruise/tour/charter card or title in the listing results
Click on a different category in an on-page category switcher
Submit keyword search from the site-wide search field in the header while on this page
Click on the cart icon in the header while browsing listings
Click on the site logo to return to the homepage

access_methods.description: Accessed via header navigation links such as "All Cruises", "Sightseeing Cruises", "Dinner Cruises", "Sunset & Evening", "Family Cruises", and "Private Charters" (each passing a categoryId parameter)
Accessed via the "All Cruises" footer link (categoryId=all_cruises)
Accessed via links from the homepage hero or featured category tiles that include a categoryId parameter

pages.name: Cruise / Tour Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific cruise, tour, or private charter with full description, inclusions, gallery, availability calendar, pricing breakdown, and booking controls for dates, times, passengers, and extras.
primary_functions: Show detailed information including description, images, duration, schedule, departure location, inclusions (e.g., lunch, drinks, audio guide, live music), and cancellation terms
Display pricing per passenger type (adult, child, etc.) and any charter flat-rate pricing with clear breakdowns
Allow users to choose a date via a calendar (e.g., specific Fridays in June, Saturdays or Sundays in September, Sundays next month, next available Saturday for dinner cruise)
Allow users to select departure times or time slots (morning, afternoon, evening, specific sunset or pre-2:00 PM departures)
Allow users to set passenger quantities by type (e.g., 2 adults, 1 child, 10 guests, 3 adults, 1 adult)
Allow selection or deselection of optional extras or inclusions where available (e.g., drinks, onboard meal), while enabling leaving extras unselected or choosing the cheapest extra if required
Show live price updates for the selected date, time, passengers, and extras, including total price and per-adult pricing where relevant
Provide a primary action to add the configured cruise or tour to the cart (e.g., Add to Cart or Book) for multi-item booking scenarios
Provide a primary or secondary action to directly proceed to a booking overview (cart) for single-item bookings (e.g., Book Now or Continue)
For private charters, support a Request Booking or similar action using the same flow while clearly indicating it is a charter request

incoming_params.description: cruiseTourId of the cruise, tour, or charter to display in detail
Optional preselected date (YYYY-MM-DD) for the availability calendar
Optional preselected time slot identifier, used when deep-linking to a specific departure
Optional initial adult passenger count to prefill the booking widget
Optional initial child passenger count to prefill the booking widget
Optional initial total guest count for private charters to prefill the booking widget

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Add to Cart", "Book", or "Continue" when following a flow that shows a booking summary in the cart
Click on a primary "Book Now" button that goes directly to checkout for a single cruise or tour booking
Click on a breadcrumb or category link such as "Back to Sightseeing" or "Back to Sunset & Evening"
Submit a new keyword search from the header search bar while viewing this product
Click on the cart icon in the header from the detail page

access_methods.description: Accessed by clicking a cruise/tour card from listings or search, passing id as a query parameter (product.html?id=CRUISE_ID)
Accessible from marketing campaigns or emails linking directly to a specific cruise/tour URL including the id parameter

pages.name: Gift Cards
pages.description: Dedicated page to purchase gift cards or vouchers usable for cruises and tours, with options for custom amounts, applicability scope, recipient/sender details, message, and delivery method.
primary_functions: Offer fixed-value and custom-amount gift card options with an input for custom values (e.g., entering 150)
Let users choose applicability (e.g., valid for all cruises, any tour, or specific categories) via a simple dropdown
Collect recipient details, including recipient name and email address
Collect sender details and an optional personalized message to be printed on or included with the gift card
Allow users to select a delivery method (e.g., email) and confirm default choices if present
Add the configured gift card to the cart for later checkout

incoming_params.description: Optional gift card template ID to preselect a specific template (e.g., an "Any Cruise" gift card template)
Optional initial gift card amount to prefill the custom amount field (e.g., 150)
Optional initial applicability scope (e.g., 'all_cruises', 'any_tour') preselected in the scope dropdown

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Add to Cart" or "Buy Gift Card" after configuring a gift card
Click on "Checkout" from a mini-cart or sticky summary on the gift card page
Click on site logo or "Back to Home" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Gift Cards" link in the primary header navigation
Accessed via the "Gift Cards" link in the footer navigation
Linked from marketing campaigns promoting gift vouchers

pages.name: Cart / Booking Overview
pages.description: Overview of all selected cruises, tours, private charters, and gift cards with item-level details, pricing breakdowns, and a gateway to proceed to checkout.
primary_functions: List all items currently selected (e.g., multiple sightseeing tours for one day, gift card, single cruise bookings) with date, time, passenger details, and prices
Show subtotals for each line item and a combined total for all bookings and products
Allow users to remove items or adjust quantities and passenger counts (within logical constraints) and refresh total price
Provide links back to each items detail page for editing date/time or configuration if needed
Allow users to proceed to checkout to enter customer details and payment information
Serve as the booking summary or overview page required by tasks that stop after reviewing total price without completing payment

incoming_params.description: Optional cart_item_id used to visually highlight the most recently added item in the cart
Optional source identifier used for analytics or back-navigation hints (e.g., 'product', 'gift_cards', 'home')

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the primary "Proceed to Checkout" button
Click on an item name or "Edit" link for a cruise/tour within the cart
Click on an "Add a gift card" link or upsell section in the cart
Click on "Continue browsing" or the site logo from the cart page

access_methods.description: Accessed via the cart icon or "Cart" link in the header on any page
Accessed after adding an item from a product or gift card page, optionally including highlightItemId

pages.name: Checkout & Payment
pages.description: Final booking and payment step where users review their order, apply promo codes, enter contact and billing details, and submit payment for cruises, charters, and gift cards.
primary_functions: Display a full summary of all items being purchased, including cruises, tours, charters, and gift cards, with dates, times, passenger counts, and totals
Allow users to enter contact details and any required passenger information
Provide a field to apply promotional codes (e.g., entering and applying SUMMER10) and update pricing accordingly while staying on the page
Collect payment details and billing information for completing the booking or gift card purchase
Require users to confirm agreement with terms and cancellation policies via links to those pages
On successful completion, direct users to the booking confirmation page with a summary of their purchase

outgoing_connections.trigger: Successful completion of payment and booking via the "Pay Now" or "Confirm Booking" button
Click on "Back to Cart" link to adjust items before finalizing payment
Click on "Terms & Conditions" link before accepting terms
Click on "Cancellation Policy" link while reviewing booking conditions
Click on "Privacy Policy" link regarding personal data usage at checkout

access_methods.description: Accessed after clicking "Proceed to Checkout" from the Cart / Booking Overview page
Optionally accessed from a "Checkout" call-to-action in the header when the cart is not empty

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Search results page for keyword-based discovery of cruises, tours, and charters such as location-based searches (e.g., Old Town Pier), with filters and sorting similar to category listings.
primary_functions: Display search results for user-entered keywords (e.g., Old Town Pier) across all cruises, tours, and charters
Allow filtering results by departure point/location (e.g., selecting Old Town Pier as the departure point)
Allow filtering by date range (e.g., today to 7 days from today) and by duration (e.g., 60 to 90 minutes)
Allow filtering by price per adult (e.g., minimum 30, maximum 60) and other attributes similar to category listings
Allow sorting by departure time (earliest first) and other relevant criteria
Enable users to open detailed product pages for specific search results to configure and book

incoming_params.description: Free-text search query entered by the user (e.g., 'Old Town Pier')
Optional departure location filter applied at search time (e.g., location id for Old Town Pier)
Optional start date of the search date range (YYYY-MM-DD), e.g., today
Optional end date of the search date range (YYYY-MM-DD), e.g., today + 7 days
Optional minimum duration filter for search results (e.g., 60)
Optional maximum duration filter for search results (e.g., 90)
Optional minimum price per adult filter (e.g., 30)
Optional maximum price per adult filter (e.g., 60)
Optional initial sort order for search results (e.g., 'departure_time_asc' for earliest departures first)

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a search result card or title
Click on the cart icon in the header from the search results page
Click on a category tag in a search result to view more cruises in that category

access_methods.description: Accessed by submitting the search bar on the homepage, passing the query and optional filters as parameters
Accessed when performing a keyword search from the header while on a category listing

pages.name: About Us
pages.description: Informational page about the river cruise and boat tours operator, including history, mission, fleet, safety practices, and testimonials to build trust.
primary_functions: Explain the companys history, mission, and experience operating river cruises and boat tours
Highlight strengths such as safety standards, fleet information, and customer service
Reassure users by showcasing testimonials, awards, or key facts where appropriate

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a call-to-action such as "View All Cruises" from the About page
Click on "Contact us" or similar enquiry link

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "About Us" link in the footer navigation
Linked from external sources or search engines to provide company background

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and enquiry page for the operator, including phone, email, office address, departure locations map, and a contact form for general or charter-specific questions.
primary_functions: Provide contact details such as phone number, email address, and physical office or pier locations
Offer a simple contact form for general questions, private charter inquiries, or booking support
Provide directions or a map to main departure points or the office where relevant

incoming_params.description: Optional initial enquiry type to preselect in the contact form (e.g., 'general', 'private_charter', 'booking_support')
Optional subject line to prefill the contact form based on where the user came from

outgoing_connections.trigger: Stay on page and show success message after successful form submission
Click on "View Private Charters" link after reading about charter enquiries

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Contact" link in the footer navigation
Linked from external directories or search engines for contact details

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Frequently asked questions about schedules, inclusions, accessibility, bookings, cancellations, and gift card usage, grouped into topical sections.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about schedules, inclusions (meals, drinks, live music), accessibility, and what to bring
Clarify how booking, modification, and cancellation work, referencing the detailed cancellation policy where needed
Address questions about gift card usage and validity across cruises and tours

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on links within answers that reference the detailed cancellation policy
Click on links within gift-card-related FAQs
Click on "contact us" links for questions not covered by the FAQ

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "FAQ" link in the footer navigation

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing the use of the website and participation in cruises and tours, referenced from checkout and other key pages.
primary_functions: Present the contractual terms for bookings, including responsibilities and limitations of liability
Outline rules for participation in cruises, tours, and private charters
Provide a legal reference that can be linked from checkout and other pages

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on browser back or header navigation to return to checkout after reviewing terms

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Terms & Conditions" link in the footer navigation
Accessed from links in the checkout page that open the terms in the same tab or a new tab

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information about how user data is collected, stored, and used, including rights and contact methods for privacy-related queries.
primary_functions: Explain what personal data is collected during browsing, booking, and payment
Describe how data is stored, protected, and shared, if at all
Provide information about user rights regarding their personal data

outgoing_connections.trigger: Return to checkout after reviewing privacy details
Click on a link to contact the company about privacy concerns

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Privacy Policy" link in the footer navigation

pages.name: Cancellation Policy
pages.description: Detailed policy covering cancellations, refunds, and free cancellation timings, referenced from product pages, FAQ, and checkout.
primary_functions: Explain conditions for free cancellation (e.g., up to 24 hours before departure) and how it applies to different tours
Describe refund processes, timelines, and any fees for late cancellations or no-shows
Serve as a reference linked from product pages, FAQ, and checkout so users can confirm conditions before booking

outgoing_connections.trigger: Return to checkout after reviewing cancellation terms
Use browser back or relevant link from a product page after reading more detailed policy

access_methods.description: Accessed via the "Cancellation Policy" link in the footer navigation
Accessed via links from the checkout page to read cancellation conditions in detail

pages.name: Booking Confirmation
pages.description: Post-checkout confirmation page summarizing completed bookings and purchases, with reference code, item details, and practical next steps.
primary_functions: Confirm successful booking or purchase with a clear reference number
Summarize all booked cruises, tours, charters, and gift cards, including dates, times, passenger counts, and total paid
Provide next steps such as printing or saving confirmation, viewing departure details, and contacting support if needed

incoming_params.description: Reference code for the booking order, used to retrieve confirmation details

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on "Back to Home" after viewing confirmation
Click on a CTA such as "Book another cruise" from the confirmation page
Click on a "Contact support" link related to the confirmed booking

access_methods.description: Accessed after successful checkout when redirected with a reference parameter
Accessed via direct link from confirmation emails including ?reference=REFERENCE_CODE

header_links.description: Homepage with featured cruises and quick search
Browse all available cruises and tours
Private evening and custom charters for groups
Purchase gift cards usable for cruises and tours

footer_links.description: Learn more about the cruise operator
Frequently asked questions about cruises and bookings
Details on cancellations, refunds, and free cancellation options
Booking and website terms and conditions
Information about data collection and privacy
Buy or learn about cruise gift cards
Link to browse all cruises and tours
